attributes.Sql Query:

, CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
, 'CDC' AS GLOBAL_NAME  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME               
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE  
FROM
(
SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL
WHERE ORG_ID NOT IN (SELECT ORG_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_ENABLED_ORG)
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
)CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL
WHERE CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
AND COALESCE(UPPER(CDC_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL.Interface_Header_Context),'UNK') NOT LIKE '%HISTORY%'
